title: [codereview-1] compact_cot.py: isfinite checks should also guard lat/lon floats for consistency with NaN behavior
description: Although range checks catch NaN for lat/lon (False), explicit math.isfinite() after float() would make validation uniform and error message clearer. P4 readability/consistency. Scope limited but per 'fix ALL' and RULE, file it. Fix by adding checks.
close_reason: Fixed in main implementation and docs per RULE (all priorities including P4).
